message:
test(demo): Update help overlay snapshot with palette keybindings

Update app_help_overlay_120x40.snap to reflect new command palette
keybindings added in the help overlay:
- Ctrl+1..6: Filter by category
- Ctrl+0: Clear category filter
- Ctrl+F: Toggle favorite
- Ctrl+Shift+F: Favorites only

Also includes the new category legend at the bottom of the help panel
showing all ScreenCategory values with their accent colors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
